issuerId.description: An identifier for the issuer related to the point of contact.

userFullName.description: The point of contact full name.

type.description:
Types of points of contact.

 - PRIMARY_CONTACT: Primary Contact
 - OPTION_EXERCISE_APPROVER: Option Exercise Approver
 - STAKEHOLDER_RELATIONS: Stakeholder Relations
 - LEGAL_ADMIN: Legal Admin
 - FINANCE_ADMIN: Finance Admin
 - VALUATIONS_CONTACT: Valuations Contact
 - HR_ADMIN: HR Admin
 - PAYROLL_ADMIN: Payroll Admin
 - INVESTOR_RELATIONS: Investor Relations
 - FINANCIAL_REPORTING_ADMIN: Financial Reporting Admin
 - LIQUIDITY_CONTACT: Liquidity Contact
 - LEFT_SIGNATORY: Left Signatory
 - RIGHT_SIGNATORY: Right Signatory
 - OPTION_SIGNATORY: Option Signatory
 - CONVERTIBLE_NOTE_SIGNATORY: Convertible Note Signatory
 - WARRANT_SIGNATORY: Warrant Signatory

description: A point of contact for an issuer. Examples include a Legal Admin or an Option Signatory.
